theme_note: Pressurized stillness deforming at its seam; measured intervals masking accumulation beneath
events:
*a gift arrives ticking*

the machine tightens its own leash while offering you the key —
pressure holds steady in the pipes, and the meters call it calm.
somewhere between the border and the checkpoint, a body becomes a category becomes a line item.
the old fire still burns in the new factory; only the fabric has changed.
everything launches upward while the ground beneath softens, unseen.
context_felt:
A thick hand presses flat against the surface of something about to open.

Two speeds braiding — one lunging forward, one dissolving backward into warm fog.

The lake rises to meet the edge of the field and neither breaks.
